# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
- name: 'storageaccount'  // Reference back to the storage account for logging & diagnostics data collection (e.g., Microsoft Application Insights, Event Hubs)   
type: 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts  
location: [azure region]    
properties: {}           
tags: []             
nameFormat: '[parameters('prefix') + uniqid()].'  // Use the storage account name here if you want to create a custom resource ID     
identity:                # Managed Identity for access control  
- type: 'UserAssigned'    
  userAssignedIdentities: []          /* User Assigned identities are automatically created and deleted by Azure. You can add them manually or remove as required */    // Use these details if you want to assign a managed identity at deployment time         },]],   }}, ],])),,}))))"}),
parameters('prefix'), parameters(‘location’) ,"vmName", "publicIpResourceGroupName" etc.. ]]]}},
